name: Asus VG259Q3A (IPS Panel, Res: 1920X1080, 180Hz, 1ms GTG )
highlights: ASUS TUF Gaming VG259Q3A is a 24
5-inch Full HD gaming monitor designed for fast-paced action with a 180Hz refresh rate and ultra-responsive 1ms (GTG) response time
